title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1061
summary: Pritesh Agarwal was implicated in a narcotics trafficking case based on a parcel addressed to him that was found to contain 25 LSD blots (0.42 grams, commercial quantity). He initially denied knowledge but later admitted to ordering the LSD through the dark web from Zambada Cartel, paying via cry...
